parameter.description: The application main activity or URL
parameter.name: Activity/URL

parameter.description: If set to true then will launch in instrument mode
parameter.name: Instrument

parameter.description: If set to true then will stop the running process before launching it
parameter.name: Stop If Running

parameter.defaultValue: //*[@text='Assign/Split Assign/Split' or @label='Assign/Split Assign/Split' or @name='Assign/Split Assign/Split' or @value='Assign/Split Assign/Split']
parameter.name: Element

parameter.defaultValue: //*[@text='Overview Overview' or @label='Overview Overview' or @name='Overview Overview' or @value='Overview Overview']
parameter.name: Element
